---
title: "index - Bones and soft tissues"
format: html
---

Test text.

Here is some text

-   callouts

-   References

According to @volpicelli2012 ...

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
Additional explanation.
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Clinical Pearl"}
A visible B-line excludes pneumothorax at that location.
:::

<details>

<summary>Show answer</summary>

The correct answer is C.

</details>

::: aside
Remember: Probe marker → patient's head.
:::

-   Footnotes

Pleural sliding excludes pneumothorax at that location.[^index-1]

[^index-1]: Not necessarily the entire hemithorax.

See @fig-lungpoint.

![Lung point sign](/images/lungs/lung-point.jpg){#fig-lungpoint}
